data.title: ‘Scale or fail’: RLNC technology can boost Web3 adoption — MIT Professor
data.description:
After 15 years of research at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), Random Linear Network Coding (RLNC) is ready for commercialization in the Web3 industry, according to Muriel Médard, an MIT professor and founder of blockchain infrastructure developer Optimum.Optimum emerged from stealth on Feb. 28 as a decentralized memory infrastructure that can be utilized by any blockchain...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/scale-fail-rlnc-technology-web3-adoption-mit-professor?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP flips Ether’s FDV amid change in market dynamics
data.description:
XRP’s fully diluted valuation (FDV) has surpassed Ether (ETH), according to March 14 data from CoinGecko. The FDV flip signifies a reversal of fortune for both layer-1 (L1) blockchain networks behind the tokens, as XRP Ledger’s decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem gains traction and Ethereum grapples with competition from rival L1s, such as Solana.As of March 14, XRP’s FDV stood at nearly...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/xrp-flips-ether-fdv-change-market-dynamics?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Cardano News: Loses Hit $15 Billion Since Trump Altered Crypto Strategy
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) price and market valuation has suffered a significant market setback following President Donald Trump’s Cardano news reveal of a reversal on its inclusion in the U.S. Crypto Strategic Reserve. Initially, on March 2, 2025, Trump announced via Truth Social that ADA would be part of the reserve. This triggered a 60% price rally […]
The post Cardano News: Loses Hit $15 Billion Since...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/14/cardano-news-loses-hit-15-billion-since-trump-altered-crypto-strategy/

data.title: California man sentenced to over seven years in federal prison for crypto laundering scheme
data.description:
John Khuu, a California man, received an 87-month sentence after he pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit money laundering. The U.S. DOJ claimed the accused imported counterfeit pharmaceuticals and sold them in the US in exchange for Bitcoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/california-man-crypto-laundering-scheme/

data.title: Michael Saylor outsmarts Wall Street as his Bitcoin empire keeps expanding
data.description:
Michael Saylor has built a Bitcoin empire while Wall Street sat on the sidelines. He turned Strategy into a corporate Bitcoin vault, using convertible bonds to stack billions in crypto while traditional firms drowned in debt. Now, that empire is growing again. A new exchange-traded fund (ETF) focused on companies with Bitcoin holdings is launching, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/michael-saylor-outsmarts-wall-street-as-his-bitcoin-empire-keeps-expanding/

data.description:

data.title: Russia Side-Stepping Western Sanctions by Trading Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and USDT for Oil: Report
data.description:
Russia is using cryptocurrencies in oil transactions with India and China, according to a new Reuters report. Citing “four sources with direct knowledge of the matter,” the new report claims that some Russian oil companies are using Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and USDT to ease the conversion of Indian rupees and Chinese yuan to Russian […]
The post Russia Side-Stepping Western Sanctions by...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/russia-side-stepping-western-sanctions-by-trading-bitcoin-btc-ethereum-eth-and-usdt-for-oil-report/

data.title: BlackRock now holds over 567,000 BTC, valued at over $47 billion
data.description:
BlackRock, the world’s largest asset manager with approximately $11.6 trillion in assets under management, currently holds over 567,000 Bitcoin (BTC), valued at over $47.8 billion — making the asset manager one of the largest holders of BTC in the world.According to Arkham Intelligence, the asset manager’s most recent BTC acquisition occurred on March 14 when a Coinbase Prime wallet...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/blackrock-holds-47-billion-bitcoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
